/usr/bin/ar qc libtree-sitter-typescript-parser.a "CMakeFiles/tree-sitter-typescript-parser.dir/vendor/tree-sitter-typescript/typescript/src/parser.c.o" "CMakeFiles/tree-sitter-typescript-parser.dir/vendor/tree-sitter-typescript/typescript/src/scanner.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libtree-sitter-typescript-parser.a
